rationale: For Portugal, the most relevant development remains the Iran deal progress, which could ease energy costs; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life in Lisbon.

top_events.title: Iran deal 'never been closer'
top_events.summary: Continued signals of an imminent Iran deal could lower global oil and gas prices, offering modest relief to Portuguese households and businesses still sensitive to energy costs.

top_events.title: UN adopts treaty setting standards for gig economy workers
top_events.summary: A new UN treaty on gig worker standards could eventually influence EU labor policy, with marginal relevance to Portugal's growing platform economy sector.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy
top_events.summary: Distant from Portugal's daily concerns; the admission has no direct impact on Iberian life, though it marginally affects EU-wide geopolitical stability.
